title: agrostis gigantea var. repens
intro: Agrostis gigantea var. repens, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a perennial grass species commonly found in moist to wet soils. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating minor wounds, as well as being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Agrostis gigantea var. repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
